name: Farmers And Merchants Bank Of Long Beach
description_short: Farmers & Merchants Bank is a full-service bank offering personal and business banking, commercial lending, and specialty services for healthcare and faith-based organizations.
description_long:
Farmers & Merchants Bank (F&M Bank) operates as a traditional community bank providing comprehensive financial services to both personal and business clients. The institution has established itself as a significant player in the banking sector, earning recognition on Forbes' 'America's Best Banks' list for 2026, which underscores its commitment to quality service and financial stability.

The bank offers an extensive range of services across personal and business banking segments. For personal customers, F&M provides multiple checking and savings account tiers (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze, Senior, College, and Teen accounts), home loans with experienced loan officers, personal credit cards with fraud protection, money market accounts, CDs, IRAs, and health savings accounts. For business clients, the bank delivers treasury management solutions, commercial lending including SBA loans and commercial real estate financing, business checking accounts with various analyzed and non-analyzed options, merchant services, payables and receivables management, and specialized cash management tools like remote deposit capture and lockbox services.

F&M Bank distinguishes itself through specialized service divisions targeting specific market segments. The bank operates dedicated Healthcare Client Services and Religious Client Services units, demonstrating intentional focus on serving healthcare providers and faith-based organizations. Additionally, the bank emphasizes personalized one-to-one support and local expertise, positioning itself as a relationship-driven institution rather than a transactional competitor. The bank's digital banking platform provides on-the-go access, and it offers multiple online services including personal online banking, business online banking, secure messaging, and electronic lockbox services.

Farmers & Merchants Bank operates as a legitimate, established financial institution with FDIC-standard protections and regulatory compliance (evidenced by Operation S.A.F.E.). The main caveat is that as a traditional bank with physical location requirements, it may have less competitive rates than online-only institutions and requires customers to commit to the bank's specific service ecosystem rather than offering the flexibility of fintech alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Checking Accounts (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze, Senior, College, Teen tiers)
Personal Savings, Money Market Accounts, CDs, and IRAs
Home Loans with loan officers and mortgage calculators
Personal Credit Cards with fraud protection
Business Checking Accounts (Analyzed, Non-Analyzed, Interest-bearing options)
Business Savings Accounts and Business Credit Cards
Treasury Management with cash flow management and risk mitigation
Commercial Lending (Real Estate, SBA, Commercial & Industrial, Specialty Lending)
Merchant Services and Mobile Remote Deposit Capture
Payables and Receivables Management (ACH origination, lockbox services, bill pay)
Digital Banking and Online Banking with cash management tools
Healthcare and Religious Organization Specialty Services
pros: Named to Forbes' America's Best Banks list for 2026, indicating strong institutional performance
Offers specialized banking solutions for healthcare providers and faith-based organizations through dedicated service units
Comprehensive business banking services including treasury management, commercial lending, SBA loans, and merchant services
Multiple tiered checking and savings account options for different customer segments (Senior, College, Teen, Platinum accounts)
Digital banking platform with remote deposit capture, mobile RDC, and online bill pay for convenience
One-to-one personalized service model with experienced loan officers and dedicated client support
Broad lending solutions including commercial real estate, 1031 exchanges, and specialty lending for renovation projects
cons: As a traditional bank with physical locations, may have higher fees and less competitive rates than digital-only competitors
Limited information available on website regarding specific APR rates, fee schedules, or account minimum balance requirements
Specialty services focused on healthcare and faith-based organizations may limit relevance for general business customers
Website does not clearly display insurance products or investment advisory services despite mentioning investment services in login options
No information provided about mobile app capabilities, mobile wallet support, or cryptocurrency integration
best_for: Healthcare providers and practitioners seeking specialized banking services and industry expertise
Faith-based organizations and religious institutions requiring banking tailored to non-profit operations
Small to medium-sized business owners needing comprehensive treasury management and commercial lending solutions
Customers prioritizing relationship-based banking with local presence and personalized loan officer support
diagnosis: Farmers & Merchants Bank is best for small-to-medium business owners, healthcare providers, faith-based organizations, and personal customers seeking relationship-driven banking with local presence and personalized service. The main caveat is that traditional banks typically offer less competitive rates than fintech alternatives, and this institution requires understanding its specific fee structures and account minimums before committing.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Farmers & Merchants Bank offers personal and business banking, commercial lending, and specialty services for healthcare and faith-based organizations.
fdic_official_name: Farmers and Merchants Bank of Long Beach
